CreateMetaSyncRule.clientToken: Ensures idempotency of the API call
CreateMetaSyncRule.type:
Metadata sync rule type. Enum values:
• MANUAL: one-time sync, executed manually;
• PERIODIC: periodic sync, executed automatically
CreateMetaSyncRule.directory: RapidFS directory prefix, default value is /
CreateMetaSyncRule.intervalMinutes: Sync interval in minutes, default 5 min. Valid range: [1, 28800 (20 days)]
CreateMetaSyncRule.executeOnCreate: Whether to execute immediately after a one-time sync rule is created, default false
CreateMetaSyncRule.enableOnCreate: Whether to enable a periodic sync rule by default upon creation, default true
